product_overview: SSPS is a data-driven dashboard that detects shopping trends from Naver data, visualizes multi-dimensional trend signals, and helps users discover and monetize high-potential short-form product ideas. It offers realtime stats, 3D trend visualizations, category-depth analysis, popular keyword exploration, and an AI-assisted short-form plan generator (RAPTOR).
core_goals: Discover currently hot or seasonally rising product categories and keywords based on Naver Shopping trends.
Inspect multi-dimensional trend patterns across major domains via an interactive 3D visualization to identify timing and trajectory.
Search a category or keyword to retrieve related products, keywords, and a focused trend chart for idea validation.
Quickly start analysis from popular keywords to surface candidate products and trend context.
Generate short-form video plans and top product recommendations from selected trends using the RAPTOR AI page.

features.name: Global Real-time Stats
features.description: Show realtime collection and sync status plus top-collected keywords and active dataset version so users understand current data freshness and major signals.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See global statistics load on page initialization -> Observe active sync version and top collected keywords
Navigate to / -> See data freshness indicators and collection progress when rolling updates are in progress -> Note which domains show highest recent activity

features.name: 3D Trend Visualization
features.description: Render a 3-axis 3D trend chart of time, category/domain, and ratio so users can visually inspect trajectories and drill into domain-level trends.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See 3D trend chart render for the major domains -> Select a chart point to view that domain's time-series details
Navigate to / -> See 3D chart render on page initialization -> Pan or rotate the view to inspect different domains and time slices

features.name: N-Depth Category Analysis
features.description: Search a category or keyword to retrieve an N-depth category tree, related products and keywords, and a focused trend chart for the chosen node.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter a category keyword -> Submit the search -> See returned product list and an updated trend chart for the selected category
Navigate to / -> Enter a keyword fragment -> Submit the search -> Explore the returned category path and drill into listed products and keywords
Navigate to / -> Focus search input -> Submit without entering a keyword -> See a validation prompt requesting a keyword

features.name: Popular Keywords
features.description: Surface currently popular keyword chips so users can quickly start analysis from high-signal search terms.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See popular keyword chips load on page initialization -> Select a popular keyword -> See the product list and trend chart filtered to that keyword
Navigate to / -> Browse the list of popular keywords -> Choose a keyword to seed a deeper category analysis

features.name: RAPTOR AI Short-form Plan Generation
features.description: Provide an AI-assisted workflow that converts selected trends or keywords into short-form video plans, top product picks, and hook points to speed up content ideation and monetization.
user_flows: Navigate to /raptor.html -> Provide a keyword or select an existing trend to analyze -> Request generation of a short-form plan -> See a generated video plan with top 3 recommended products and extracted hook points
Navigate to /raptor.html -> Provide initial input and request generation -> Review the generated plan -> Refine the input and request regeneration -> See an updated plan reflecting the refinement

routes.description: Main dashboard for shopping trend visualization
RAPTOR AI video and plan generation page

user_interactions: View stats loaded on page initialization

user_interactions: Click on chart points to see specific data
